title: Is there a way to disable @everyone updates
excerpt:
Hello Everyone, 
Is there a way to disable the ability to @everyone update? We have a really large team and everyone is a subscriber but it is VERY rare that everyone needs to be notified. We also have clients in the sys…

posts.author: ChrisH2 (Chris)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Everyone,

Is there a way to disable the ability to @everyone update? We have a really large team and everyone is a subscriber but it is VERY rare that everyone needs to be notified. We also have clients in the system so “education” will be a tricky sell.

Thanks!

posts.author: faiqharris (Faiq Harris)
posts.cookedHtml: Totally understand the concern—there’s currently no native way to disable @everyone, but limiting who can post updates or creating smaller subscriber groups might help.
